title: Coordinated Compass
description: Enhances compass functionality by allowing them to be used for checking your coordinates
body:
Adds a few small features to compasses to make them more useful/improve the immersion of gameplay with coordinates without involving the F3 menu.

- Compasses will to display your current X and Z coordinates on right click.
- On top of that, Lodestone Compasses will also display the X and Z of their currently bound lodestone on sneak + right click.
- Having a recovery compass in your inventory will allow it to constantly display your coordinates and/or the biome you are in, configurable by right clicking the compass in the inventory to cycle through its settings.


Pairs well with [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)' altimeter, which shows your Y coordinate on right click.
